agency.name: Safari Makarska
agency.description: Safari Makarska specializes in unforgettable hiking and adventure experiences on Mount Biokovo. With over 10 years of experience, we offer expertly guided tours for all skill levels.
agency.aboutText: We are passionate about sharing the natural beauty of Mount Biokovo with adventurers from around the world. Our experienced guides are dedicated to ensuring your safety, comfort, and memorable experiences.
